assignments.name: Add_Values_to_Delivery_Opp_Product
assignments.label: Add Values to Delivery Opp Product

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Add_to_Temp_Array
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Add to Temp Array

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Add_Values_to_Opp_Product
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Add Values to Opp Product

formulas.name: managedServiceNote
formulas.expression: {!managedServices.firstSelectedRow.Sub_Product__r.Name} & " has been added to " & {!productName} & " - Grouping: " & TEXT({!groupCounter}) & ". Cost - £5" & BR()

fields.name: managedServiceText
fields.fieldText:
The MPS Standard fee is £5 per month.

If you have a different price, please upload director approval here.

fields.name: locationCreated
fields.fieldText:
﻿Location has been created successfully.

Please type the whole name into the search bar to add the location to the grouping

{!Get_Opportunit.Account.Name} - {!newCustomerAddress.postalCode}

fields.name: Copy_1_of_locationText
fields.fieldText: This is Text for {!locations[$EachItem].Name} and product {!productName}

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_locationText
fields.fieldText: This is Text for {!locations[$EachItem].Name} and product {!productName}
